headline: Is Global Payments Inc. (GPN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: We came across a bullish thesis on Global Payments Inc. on R. Dennis’s Substack by OppCost. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GPN. Global Payments Inc.’s share was trading at $77.70 as of March 3rd. GPN’s trailing and forward P/E were 17.58 and 5.63 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Global Payments Inc. provides payment technology […]

headline: Global Payments to Present at Wolfe FinTech Forum
summary: ATLANTA, March 04, 2026--Global Payments Inc. announced today that Cameron Bready, chief executive officer, will present live at the Wolfe FinTech Forum.

headline: American Express opens Sidecar by The Centurion Lounge in Las Vegas (LAS). Here's how to get in
summary: Sidecar by The Centurion Lounge is a speakeasy-inspired airport lounge for guests on the go.
